title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
